title: pouteria rufotomentosa
intro: Pouteria rufotomentosa, also known as the rough-barked pouteria or the yellow-velvet tree, is a species of plant in the family Sapotaceae. The medicinal properties of this plant include its ability to exhibit antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Pouteria rufotomentosa include the potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and exhibit antiviral properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
